constitutional_claims: IsolatedReplayStore rejects production-mode construction at object level — dual mechanical write rejection
writeProduction() always throws ReplayProductionWriteError — no silent degradation path
ReplaySnapshot.data immutable via Object.freeze() — replay snapshots cannot be mutated during harness run
FullPipelineReplayHarness runs all four pipeline stages: ingestion → scoring → promotion → distribution
production_write_count invariant: always 0 on clean replay run
ReplayRun returned with divergence_detected flag and per-stage results for downstream UTV2-1093 wiring
